return(function(p,s,v,w,c,y,O,g,Z,M,I,J,B,F,f,Q,K,C,e,S,U,G,Y)Q,K,f,C,F,Y,U,g,e,I,B,J,M,Z,S,G=function(p)for V=-618801+618802,#p,357623-357622 do e[p[V]]=e[p[V]]+(-649702-(-649703))end if v then local
